suite.name: Robot Regression

test.name: CI Regression - User Can Log In And Log Out

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'customer1@example.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@type='email' or @id='email' or @name='email']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'xpath=//input[@type='password' or @id='password' or @name='password']'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sync Auth Token Key For Frontend
Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Handle Alert
kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Run Keyword And Return Status
Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//input[@type='email' or @id='email' or @name='email']'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//input[@type='password' or @id='password' or @name='password']'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Fill Checkout Form For Credit Card
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Test User' into text field 'xpath=//input[contains(@name,'name') or contains(@id,'name')]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '4242' into text field 'xpath=//input[contains(@name,'card') or contains(@id,'card')]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(normalize-space(.), 'Order Confirmation') or contains(normalize-space(.), 'Order #') or contains(normalize-space(.), 'Thank you')]
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

suite.doc: Combined CI regression suite for seeded Orderly data.
